MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on this 1st day of July, 2026.

1. Definition of Confidential Information

"Confidential Information" means any proprietary information disclosed by one party to another.

2. Obligations of Receiving Party

The receiving party shall maintain the confidentiality of the disclosed information with reasonable care.
